summary: Bug fixes verified: 1) PATCH /api/pets/{pet_id}/soul-answers endpoint working for inline editing, 2) POST /api/pets/{pet_id}/photo endpoint exists and accepts uploads, 3) Farewell page shows memorial services content (NOT 'Coming Soon'), 4) Shop page shows 790 products (NOT 'Coming Soon'), 5) Legacy /pet-soul-journey/{petId} redirects to /pet/{petId}

details: Endpoint accepts PATCH requests with JSON body
Updates soul answers in database
Returns new_score and answers_count
Used by UnifiedPetPage for inline question editing
Endpoint accepts multipart/form-data with photo file
Validates image type and size (max 5MB)
Saves to /app/backend/static/uploads/pets/
Returns photo_url on success
Shows 'Honouring the Bond' header with rainbow emoji
Displays 4 service categories: Hospice & Palliative Care, Cremation Services, Memorial Services, Grief Support
Shows Memorial Service Packages section
NO 'Coming Soon' text - full content displayed
Shows 'Everything Your Pet Needs' header
Displays 790 products in catalog
Category filters: All Products, Food & Nutrition, Treats & Snacks, Toys & Play, Grooming, Accessories, Health & Wellness, Celebrations
Quick filters: Best Sellers, New Arrivals, On Sale, Grain Free, Organic, Subscribe & Save
NO 'Coming Soon' text - full product catalog displayed
Navigating to /pet-soul-journey/pet-99a708f1722a redirects to /pet/pet-99a708f1722a
Pet profile page loads correctly after redirect
PetSoulJourneyRedirect component in App.js handles the redirect
Loads pet data correctly (Mojo - Indie Dog, Male)
Shows Pet Soul Score (18%)
Displays Emergency Info Card with allergies
Soul Questionnaire - 8 Pillars section with expandable pillars
Each pillar shows progress (e.g., Identity & Temperament 8/8 = 100%)
Edit icons visible for inline editing

critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/pets/{pet_id}/soul-answers endpoint correctly merges new answers with existing ones
Photo upload endpoint validates file type and size before saving
FarewellPage.jsx and ShopPage.jsx are properly imported and routed in App.js
PetSoulJourneyRedirect component uses useNavigate with replace:true for clean redirect
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 critical bugs fixed and verified: 1) Pet Soul inline editing works via PATCH endpoint, 2) Photo upload endpoint exists and works, 3) Farewell and Shop pages show full content instead of 'Coming Soon'. Legacy /pet-soul-journey/ links redirect to /pet/. The /pet-soul/{petId} route shows the Pet Soul landing page (this is intentional, not a bug).
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/farewell_page.png - Farewell page with memorial services content
